regime.summary: Smart money distributing into strength. Breadth narrowing. Macro headwinds building. Patience is the edge.

active_alerts.detail: SPY rallying on declining volume for 3 consecutive sessions. Breadth deteriorating — only 2 sectors (tech, financials) carrying the index. Classic Wyckoff distribution pattern. Smart money exiting into retail strength.
active_alerts.action: Reduce equity exposure. Set stops. Do not chase.

active_alerts.detail: Gold holding above $2,900 with volume support on dips. Central bank buying continues. DXY weakness providing tailwind. Multi-confluence long setup — inflation hedge + geopolitical demand + technical breakout.
active_alerts.action: Hold or add GLD/IAU on dips. Target: $3,200. Stop: $2,750.

active_alerts.detail: BTC consolidating between $60k-$68k. Whale accumulation detected on-chain. Fear & Greed at 14 (Extreme Fear) — historically a long-term buy signal. Not a short-term trade. Oct/Nov 2026 target window intact.
active_alerts.action: Watch-only. No new entries until macro regime clears. Target entry: $58k-$62k on confirmed support.

active_alerts.detail: 10Y yield holding above 4.2%. Fed language remains cautious. Rate cut timeline pushed to Q3 2026 at earliest. Bond market pricing in 'higher for longer' — headwind for equities and crypto.
active_alerts.action: Avoid long-duration bonds (TLT). Favor short-duration or cash equivalents.

active_alerts.detail: Utilities (XLU) and Consumer Staples (XLP) showing relative strength vs. SPY. Classic late-cycle rotation — smart money moving to defensives. Confirms distribution thesis.
active_alerts.action: Monitor. If rotation accelerates, increase defensive allocation.
